notes: All calculations are derived only from input/task.json and input/task_brief.md.
True creep-parameter fitting is marked needs_review because no creep response data are present.
Manufacturability is handled as a neutral provisional score and marked needs_review because the packet does not provide a direct processability field.

output_summary: Normalized actual outputs from artifact files.
artifacts_excluded_reason: Generated output artifacts are excluded from the public seed dataset by default.
logs_excluded_reason: Raw runner logs are excluded from the public seed dataset.
